creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit in branch main references this bug:

URL: https://cgit.FreeBSD.org/ports/commit/?id=3a3b1819c6c13e83ca98034f47b7b3b0f6325084

commit 3a3b1819c6c13e83ca98034f47b7b3b0f6325084
Author:     Tino Engel <tino.engel@mail.de>
AuthorDate: 2025-01-08 22:07:52 +0000
Commit:     Robert Clausecker <fuz@FreeBSD.org>
CommitDate: 2025-01-17 12:34:02 +0000

    x11/wlopm: update to 1.0.0

    CHANGELOG:
    - Add bash completions.
    - Fix installation on FreeBSD (thanks to Isaac Freund).
    - Follow (new) C standard by replacing noop() function (thanks to Ben
      Buse).
    - Allow compiling with clang via -Wno-strict-prototypes.
    - Fix file permissions of man page.

    PR:             283942

 x11/wlopm/Makefile             | 2 +-

 3 files changed, 6 insertions(+), 6 deletions(-)
